title: Conspiracy theories surge amid death of prominent UFO researcher David Wilcock
UFO Researcher David Wilcock Said ‘Scientists Are Going Missing’ on Livestream 48 Hours Before Death
description: David Wilcock, a prominent figure in the UFO disclosure movement and frequent guest on Ancient Aliens, has died at the age of 53 in Boulder County, Colorado. Local authorities confirmed the incident occurred on April 20 following a mental health crisis call. While officials have ruled the death a suicide, the news has sparked significant discussion due to Wilcock’s final public statements.

title: UFO expert who called for alien disclosure 'takes own life' as FBI probe missing boffins
description: UFO researcher David Wilcock was a leading figure in the 'disclosure movement' and claimed the US government possessed secret information about alien life and advanced technologies

title: UFO Author David Wilcock Death Scandal Deepens as He Insisted 'Not Suicidal at All' in Past Tweet Before Death
description: The death of UFO writer David Wilcock has sparked speculation and conspiracy theories after an old tweet resurfaced, raising questions about the circumstances surrounding his passing.

title: Chilling tweet from UFO researcher resurfaces after he dies by suicide aged 53
description: David Wilcock, a prominent figure in UFO research, was found dead after an apparent suicide on Monday (April 20).
